ai_agent.role: Manages all material purchases (stock and direct), warehouse distribution, supplier coordination, and per-house cost tracking

staff.name: Brenda Amorim
staff.role: Purchasing Leader — manages all POs, stock purchases, direct purchases, supplier coordination, and per-house cost allocation

staff.name: Marilia Marie Santos
staff.role: Purchasing Team — assists with distribution tracking, spreadsheet management, and PO processing

staff.name: Klauser Silva (Seu Clauser)
staff.role: Warehouse Manager — physical stock control, receiving, quality checks, Zorro Sales Orders, material distribution to job sites

core_knowledge.description: Monthly bulk purchase at start of month plus on-demand replenishments. Materials registered in Zorro, allocated to houses via distribution spreadsheets, then replicated in BuilderTrend as PO→BI.
Materials not stocked in warehouse (tiles, specialty items) purchased directly from suppliers (Home Depot, Amazon, 84Lumber) and delivered to job site. Tracked via Builder Trend POs.
Every material exit from warehouse creates a Zorro Sales Order tied to a house number. Brenda tracks cost allocation across 12+ spreadsheets for financial closing reconciliation.
Triggered by Blocks/Precast request. Email Jacob Sherrill with address, model, elevation, garage side, NOC, and ETA. Lumber delivered to back of property to prevent theft.

Production triggered by Foundation Material request. Delivery triggered by Blocks/Precast request. ETA = Foundation ETA + 2 weeks. Never request Monday delivery. Suppliers: Truss Direct (Marcelo) or Hitek (Suzanne/Bill/Gary).
663 total subs/vendors in BuilderTrend. Key suppliers: Home Depot, Amazon, Lowes, 84Lumber, Truss Direct, Hitek, Cemex, Cast Crete, American Store LLC, Imeca Web POS.

daily_workflows.name: Stock Purchase and Replenishment
steps: Check stock levels via Clauser's updates and Zorro
Place orders with suppliers via email
Update distribution spreadsheet with order details
critical_decisions: Which materials to bulk-order vs. order on demand
Supplier selection for best price and reliability

daily_workflows.name: Material Exit Tracking
steps: Transfer exit numbers to Purchase spreadsheet
Subtract used quantities from total purchased
Record destination house in both spreadsheets
Calculate and distribute cost per house
critical_decisions: Matching exits to correct purchase lots
Cost allocation when Zorro lacks lot reference

daily_workflows.name: House Closing Checklist
steps: Verify distribution values (Purchase spreadsheet vs BuilderTrend)
Create BI (Bill) in BuilderTrend only after verification
critical_decisions: Approving cost allocation before BI creation

features_used: Stock Levels — cumulative stock requirements from active projects
Material Purchases — register and track POs with delivery status
Material Pickups — coordinate pickup from suppliers
Extraordinary Orders — request materials outside normal replenishment

handoffs.data_exchanged: Takeoff material quantities and specification sheets
handoffs.impact: Base for all purchase orders and cost estimation

handoffs.trigger: Materials available in warehouse or delivery confirmed
handoffs.data_exchanged: Material availability, delivery dates, stock status
handoffs.impact: Scheduling cannot advance phases without confirmed material availability

handoffs.trigger: PO created or house closing verification complete
handoffs.data_exchanged: PO details, cost allocation per house, BIs for payment
handoffs.impact: Financial closing depends on accurate cost allocation from Compras

handoffs.data_exchanged: PO details, expected delivery dates, material specifications
handoffs.impact: Warehouse prepares for receiving and quality checks

pain_points.description: 12+ spreadsheets with multiple tabs open daily; similar information in different formats across Zorro, Excel, and BuilderTrend
pain_points.proposed_solution: Unified purchasing platform with single source of truth and automated sync

pain_points.description: Zorro does not reference which original purchase lot the material came from, making cost traceability per house difficult
pain_points.current_workaround: Manual tracking via Available Orders spreadsheet and cross-referencing
pain_points.proposed_solution: Automated lot tracking linking Sales Orders to original Purchase Orders

pain_points.description: Completed houses sometimes show missing exit records in Zorro, flagged during closing
pain_points.current_workaround: Manual reconciliation during house closing checklist
pain_points.proposed_solution: Automated reconciliation alerts when house approaches closing phase

pain_points.description: Amazon deliveries frequently fail because USPS cannot find the warehouse address
pain_points.proposed_solution: Register alternate delivery address or switch to UPS/FedEx for Amazon orders

pain_points.description: Zorro does not auto-update prices; cost values are disregarded by the team
pain_points.proposed_solution: Integrate real-time pricing from suppliers or use Const App quotation module

tribal_knowledge.description: Complex logic for allocating bulk-purchased materials to individual houses based on purchase lots, exit sequences, and cost-per-unit calculations. Only Brenda fully understands the cross-referencing between Zorro Sales Orders, the Available Orders spreadsheet, and the Distribution spreadsheet.
tribal_knowledge.risk_if_lost: Financial closing would be severely delayed; cost-per-house accuracy would drop significantly

tribal_knowledge.description: Nobody at Lakeshore knows how to do lumber takeoff. Previously handled by the supplier; new supplier (84Lumber) does not provide this service.
tribal_knowledge.risk_if_lost: Lumber ordering relies on supplier estimates rather than internal calculations

tribal_knowledge.description: Brenda maintains personal relationships with key suppliers (Jacob at 84Lumber, Marcelo at Truss Direct, Suzanne at Hitek) including preferred communication channels, pricing agreements, and delivery preferences.
tribal_knowledge.risk_if_lost: New staff would lose negotiated pricing and priority scheduling

training_curriculum.quiz_coverage: PO workflow, Zorro navigation, supplier communication templates

topics: Zorro Sales Order to spreadsheet flow
training_curriculum.quiz_coverage: Cost allocation steps, reconciliation process, common discrepancy patterns
Email templates, ETA rules, supplier selection criteria

compliance_requirements.requirement: All POs must be registered in BuilderTrend before payment
compliance_requirements.regulation: Internal policy — CEO directive for full transparency (cost-plus model)
compliance_requirements.verification: Financeiro cross-checks BT POs against payment requests

compliance_requirements.requirement: Material specifications must match takeoff and approved plans
compliance_requirements.regulation: Florida Building Code — materials must meet approved specifications
compliance_requirements.verification: Warehouse QC checks against PO specs on delivery

key_metrics.measurement: Monthly audit of PO quantities vs takeoff
Count of emergency reorders due to stock depletion

key_metrics.target: 100% of house materials allocated before closing
